briefdescription.para: This function is a stub for the asynchronous callback.

detaileddescription.para: The stub is here in case the upper layer forgot to set the handlers. On initialization, all handlers are set to this callback. It is considered an error for this handler to be invoked.

parameterdescription.para: is a callback reference passed in by the upper layer when setting the callback functions, and passed back to the upper layer when the callback is invoked.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to enable the global interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: This is used after setting the interrupts mask before enabling the core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SDI TX Instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to disable the global interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: This is done after disabling the core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SDI Tx Instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the SDI TX core.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the SDI TX core. Initialization of the SDI TX includes setting up the instance data and ensuring the hardware is in a quiescent state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.
points to the configuration structure associated with the SDI TX core.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if SDI TX initialization failed

briefdescription.para: This function clears the SDI TX core registers and sets them to the defaults.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.

simplesect.para: This is required after a reset or init.

briefdescription.para: This function clears the SDI TX PayloadId.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.

simplesect.para: This is required after a reset or init.

memberdef.argsstring: (XV_SdiTx *InstancePtr, XV_SdiTx_StreamSelId SelId, u32 Data, u8 StreamId)
memberdef.name: XV_SdiTx_SetStream

briefdescription.para: This function sets the SDI TX stream parameters.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.

specifies which parameter of the stream to be set.
0 = XV_SDITX_STREAMSELID_VMID
1 = XV_SDITX_STREAMSELID_COLORFORMAT
2 = XV_SDITX_STREAMSELID_BPC
3 = XV_SDITX_STREAMSELID_PPC
4 = XV_SDITX_STREAMSELID_ASPECTRATIO
5 = XV_SDITX_STREAMSELID_STANDARD
6 = XV_SDITX_STREAMSELID_STREAMINTERLACE
7 = XV_SDITX_STREAMSELID_CHANNEL
specifies what data to be set for the selected parameter.
specifies which of the streams to be set.

listitem.para:
XST_SUCCESS on successful Set stream
XST_FAILURE if TimingPtr is not derived

briefdescription.para: This function sets the SDI TX core settings.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.

specifies which parameter of the stream to be set.
0 = XV_SDITX_CORESELID_INSERTCRC
1 = XV_SDITX_CORESELID_INSERTST352
2 = XV_SDITX_CORESELID_ST352OVERWRITE
3 = XV_SDITX_CORESELID_INSERTSYNCBIT
4 = XV_SDITX_CORESELID_SDBITREPBYPASS
5 = XV_SDITX_CORESELID_USEANCIN
6 = XV_SDITX_CORESELID_INSERTLN
7 = XV_SDITX_CORESELID_INSERTEDH
specifies what data to be set for the selected parameter.

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the equivalent payload nibble for Framerate.

parameterdescription.para: is a calculated framerate based on interlaced or progressive video.
is a variable of type XSdiVid_BitRate.

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the equivalent payload bit for given VideoFormat.

parameterdescription.para: is a variable of type XVidC_VideoFormat.

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the equivalent payload bit for given AspectRatio.

parameterdescription.para: is a variable of type XVidC_AspectRatio.

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the 2nd byte of the Payload packet for all SDI modes.

parameterdescription.para: is a variable for number of active vertical lines.
is a variable to the XSdiVid_TransMode.
is a pointer to populate the Byte1 of ST352 payload.

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the Color Format for 3rd byte of the Payload packet for all SDI modes.

parameterdescription.para: is a variable to the XSdiVid_TransMode.
is a variable of type XVidC_ColorFormat.

briefdescription.para: This function updates the eotf and colorimetry fields of st352 payload value for all SDI modes.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.
is a variable of type XVidC_Eotf
is a variable of type XVidC_ColorStd

simplesect.para: This function depends on sdi mode(Transport.TMode) being set, to correctly calculate the payload

memberdef.argsstring: (XV_SdiTx *InstancePtr, XVidC_VideoMode VideoMode, XSdiVid_TransMode SdiMode, u8 DataStream)
memberdef.name: XV_SdiTx_GetPayload

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the final st352 payload value for all SDI modes with given video mode and SDI data stream number.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.
is a variable of type XVidC_VideoMode.
is a variable of type XSdiVid_TransMode.
is the stream number for which payload is calculated.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the payload id to be sent out by the TX core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.
specifies the stream which ST352 payload id is to be inserted.
specifies the data to be sent out as ST352 payload id.

memberdef.argsstring: (XV_SdiTx *InstancePtr, XV_SdiTx_PayloadLineNum1 Field1LineNum, XV_SdiTx_PayloadLineNum2 Field2LineNum, u8 Field2En)
memberdef.name: XV_SdiTx_SetPayloadLineNum

briefdescription.para: This function sets the line number of which the HANC space will be inserted with ST 352 packets.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.
specifies the field 1 line number of which ST352 packets are to be inserted
specifies the field 2 line number of which ST352 packets are to be inserted
specifies whether the TX core will send out ST352 packets in field 2 line number or not.

briefdescription.para: This function starts the TX SDI stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.

memberdef.argsstring: (XV_SdiTx *InstancePtr, XSdiVid_TransMode SdiMode, XSdiVid_BitRate IsFractional, XV_SdiTx_MuxPattern MuxPattern)
memberdef.name: XV_SdiTx_StartSdi

briefdescription.para: This function starts the SDI TX core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.
specifies the SDI mode of the SDI TX.
specifies the bitrate of the SDI TX.
specifies the data stream interleaving pattern to be used.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the SDI TX core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if register write is successful for SDI stop
XST_FAILURE if SDI stop write is failed

briefdescription.para: This function enables the ST352 value to be used from DS2 instead of DS3 register in C stream of the SDI TX Ss core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the insertion of ST352 in C stream of the SDI TX Ss core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function Set the video format of the SDI TX core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.
is a variable of type XVidC_ColorFormat.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if register write is successful for SDI stop
XST_FAILURE if SDI stop write is failed

briefdescription.para: This function clears the detected error flag and counter.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function reports the detected error by the TX core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the video bridge.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the video bridge.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the AXI4S Bridge.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the AXI4S Bridge.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the video bridge mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.
specifies the SDI bridge mode.

briefdescription.para: This function prints stream and timing information on STDIO/Uart console.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.
specifies which debug information to be printed out

briefdescription.para: This function enables 10bit YUV444 color format support for SDI Tx.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function disables 10bit YUV444 color format support for SDI Tx.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the video bit depth of SDI-TX and configures dynamic BPC support.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.
is the video bit depth to be set for SDI-TX.

briefdescription.para: This is the main file for Xilinx SDI TX core.

detaileddescription.para: Please see xv_sditx.h for more details of the driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 jsr 07/17/17 Initial release. jsr 02/23/2018 YUV420 color format support 2.0 vve 10/03/18 Add support for ST352 in C Stream
jsr 10/05/18 Moved 3GB specific video modes timing parameters from video common library to SDI common driver 3.1 vsa 08/12/20 Avoid workaround in XV_SdiTx_StreamStart() for versal device
